tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: The USA national basketball team is the most dominant team in international basketball history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: USA has won multiple Olympic gold medals and FIBA World Cups.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: The famous 1992 Dream Team included Michael Jordan, Magic Johnson and Larry Bird.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Spain is one of the strongest basketball teams in Europe.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: Spain won the FIBA Basketball World Cup in 2006 and 2019.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Famous players include Pau Gasol and Marc Gasol.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Canada has become a rising power in international basketball.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: Canada won bronze at the 2023 FIBA World Cup.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Serbia is known for producing highly skilled basketball players.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: Serbia has won several Olympic and World Cup medals.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Nikola Jokic is one of the best basketball players in the world.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Australia's national team known as the Boomers is one of the strongest teams outside Europe and USA.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: Australia won bronze at the Tokyo 2020 Olympics.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Australia has produced NBA stars like Patty Mills and Ben Simmons.
